characters.appearance: A simple 2D cartoon man with a perfectly round head, tan skin, dot eyes, and a simple line for a mouth. He has stick-figure limbs.
characters.wardrobe: A plain white t-shirt and black pants.
characters.demeanor: Expressive but simplistic, shifting from confused to pleasantly surprised.

characters.appearance: A 3D-rendered humanoid female robot. She has a white and silver metallic body with visible panel seams, glowing blue eyes, and a sculpted, symmetrical face.
characters.wardrobe: Built-in white and silver metallic chassis with a glowing blue circular chest piece.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: अगर आप इस क्लिप को समझ सकते हैं, [If you can understand this clip,]
Character A says: तो आपकी English A2 level की है। [then your English is at A2 level.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by challenging their English comprehension level.
- Sets up the premise of an English learning ad.
- Establishes a direct, engaging tone right from the start.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: अगर आप इस क्लिप को समझ सकते हैं, (If you can understand this clip,) तो आपकी English A2 level की है। (then your English is at A2 level.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: क्या कर रहे हो? [What are you doing?]
Character A says: I burn candle. [I burn candle.]
Character B says: तुम्हें बोलना चाहिए "I'm lighting a candle". [You should say "I'm lighting a candle".]
Character B says: तुम्हारी English का level क्या है? [What level is your English?]
Character A says: अरे... बस काम चलाऊ है... [Uh... just so-so...]
Character B says: टेंशन मत लो! [Don't worry!]
Character B says: Supernova के AI tutor के साथ तुम confidence से English बोल पाओगे। [You'll be able to speak English confidently with Supernova's AI tutor.]
Character A says: AI? पर मेरे पास महँगी classes के लिए पैसे नहीं हैं... [AI? But I don't have money for expensive classes...]
Character B says: अरे, Supernova बहुत affordable है! [Hey, Supernova is very affordable!]
Character B says: महँगे courses की तरह नहीं। [Not like expensive courses.]
Character B says: रोज़ practice करो, बिना किसी झिझक के। [Practice daily, without any hesitation.]
Character A says: सच में? [Really?]
Character B says: हाँ बिल्कुल! [Yes, absolutely!]
Character B says: Real-life situations में English बोलने की practice करो, [Practice speaking English in real-life situations,]
Character B says: अपने AI tutor के साथ। [with your AI tutor.]
Character A says: मतलब... एक असली tutor की तरह? [Meaning... like a real tutor?]
Character B says: हाँ, ये तुम्हारी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करेगा, [Yes, it will correct your grammar and pronunciation,]
Character B says: और तुम्हें बिना डरे बोलना सिखाएगा। [and teach you to speak without fear.]
Character A says: ठीक है... मैं अभी Supernova download करता हूँ। [Okay... I'll download Supernova right now.]
Character B says: बहुत बढ़िया फैसला! [Great decision!]
Character B says: चलो साथ मिलकर English बोलना सीखें। [Let's learn to speak English together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates a common English mistake and provides an immediate, gentle correction.
- Introduces the AI tutor as an affordable, practical solution for building confidence.
- Highlights key features like grammar correction, pronunciation, and real-life practice without aggressive hype.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: क्या कर रहे हो? (What are you doing?) I burn candle. (I burn candle.) तुम्हें बोलना चाहिए "I'm lighting a candle". (You should say "I'm lighting a candle".) तुम्हारी English का level क्या है? (What level is your English?) अरे... बस काम चलाऊ है... (Uh... just so-so...) टेंशन मत लो! (Don't worry!) Supernova के AI tutor के साथ तुम confidence से English बोल पाओगे। (You'll be able to speak English confidently with Supernova's AI tutor.) AI? पर मेरे पास महँगी classes के लिए पैसे नहीं हैं... (AI? But I don't have money for expensive classes...) अरे, Supernova बहुत affordable है! (Hey, Supernova is very affordable!) महँगे courses की तरह नहीं। (Not like expensive courses.) रोज़ practice करो, बिना किसी झिझक के। (Practice daily, without any hesitation.) सच में? (Really?) हाँ बिल्कुल! (Yes, absolutely!) Real-life situations में English बोलने की practice करो, (Practice speaking English in real-life situations,) अपने AI tutor के साथ। (with your AI tutor.) मतलब... एक असली tutor की तरह? (Meaning... like a real tutor?) हाँ, ये तुम्हारी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करेगा, (Yes, it will correct your grammar and pronunciation,) और तुम्हें बिना डरे बोलना सिखाएगा। (and teach you to speak without fear.) ठीक है... मैं अभी Supernova download करता हूँ। (Okay... I'll download Supernova right now.) बहुत बढ़िया फैसला! (Great decision!) चलो साथ मिलकर English बोलना सीखें। (Let's learn to speak English together.) Supernova AI (Supernova AI)

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: आज ही Supernova download करो! और practice शुरू करो! [Download Supernova today! And start practicing!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, urgent Call to Action (CTA).
- Reinforces the brand name and the core action of practicing.
- Directs users to the app stores.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: आज ही Supernova download करो! और practice शुरू करो! (Download Supernova today! And start practicing!) Supernova (Supernova) Download on the App Store (Download on the App Store) Get it on Google Play (Get it on Google Play)
